AutoRenewReservedInstance.autoRenewTimeUnit: Auto-renewal time unit for reserved instances, default is month, cannot be changed
AutoRenewReservedInstance.autoRenewTime: Auto-renewal duration for reserved instances; supports 3, 6, 9, 12, 24, 36 months; must match the original purchase duration (retrievable via the reservedInstanceTime field in the reserved instance list)
